today.addOrSample: Add something or try a sample task
today.quietDay: Quiet day — that's okay too. Rest counts.

quickCapture.placeholder: Add a task, reminder, or meeting...
quickCapture.hint: Try typing 'meeting with Roma tomorrow at 3pm' — it'll auto-detect the type, date, and time

welcome.step1Body: No deadlines, no guilt. MindShift works with your brain, not against it.
welcome.step2Body: Add a task → start a focus session → watch your progress grow. That's it.
welcome.step3Body: One task today is enough. Tap the input above to add your first one.

tasks.title: Your Tasks
tasks.addToStart: Add a task to start focusing
tasks.noPressure: No pressure — tap to set new dates when you're ready
tasks.energyHint: Low energy day? Start with an easy one — momentum builds from small wins.

focus.title: Focus Session
focus.pickUpWhere: PICK UP WHERE YOU LEFT OFF
focus.focusRoomHint: Focus with a friend — create a room and share the code. You'll see each other's progress.

settings.title: Settings
settings.lightComingSoon: Light theme coming soon — dark mode is best for ADHD focus
settings.targetMinutes: Target minutes of focused work per day
settings.telegramDesc: Send tasks to MindShift from Telegram. Just message the bot and your tasks appear here.
settings.telegramHowTo: You'll get a code to send to @MindShiftBot on Telegram
settings.calendarDesc: Meetings and reminders with dates appear in Google Calendar
settings.focusBlocks: Add focus sessions as time blocks
settings.focusBlocksDesc: Focus sessions will show as teal blocks in your calendar
settings.signInForCalendar: Sign in with Google to sync meetings and reminders
settings.crisisTitle: If you or someone you know is struggling

onboarding.refreshing: Refreshing your profile — changes apply immediately
onboarding.oneThingDesc: Just need to focus on one task right now
onboarding.timerPref: How do you want to see your timer?
onboarding.timeSubtitle: There's no wrong answer — this helps us personalise your timer.
onboarding.plansSubtitle: How you respond helps us support you better on tough days.
onboarding.remindersSubtitle: We'll nudge you before tasks are due — nothing aggressive, just friendly taps.

auth.linkSent: We sent a sign-in link to {{email}}

mochi.signInForMochi: Sign in so Mochi can learn your patterns and give personalized tips.

transition.allDone: All done for now. Nice work.
